channel.title: OpenAI on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in OpenAI on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Why Apple Excluded Jony Ive from Its OpenAI Lawsuit
item.description: Apple left Jony Ive out of its $6.5 billion OpenAI trade‑secret suit, hinting at Laurene Powell Jobs' influence and the company's hardware push.

item.title: OpenAI Unveils Patch
item.description: OpenAI launches effort to patch open-source bugs with AI

item.title: OpenAI & Getty Images Deal: AI Search Revolution
item.description: OpenAI partners with Getty Images to integrate licensed visuals into ChatGPT, reshaping AI search ethics and copyright practices.
